where.if: and (b.material_code like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or b.material_name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or b.warehouse_code like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
select b.material_code as materialCode, b.material_name as materialName, b.warehouse_code as warehouseCode, b.warehouse_name as warehouseName, b.location_code as locationCode, b.location_name as locationName, b.lot_no as lotNo, b.unit as unit, b.quantity as quantity, b.available_quantity as availableQuantity, b.locked_quantity as lockedQuantity, b.status as status, date_format(b.last_inbound_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as lastInboundDate, date_format(b.last_update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastUpdateTime from inventory_balance b
order by b.last_update_time desc, b.id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

where.if: and (t.material_code like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or t.material_name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or t.business_code like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
select t.transaction_type as transactionType, case t.transaction_type when 'INBOUND' then '采购入库' when 'INBOUND_REVERSE' then '采购入库弃审冲回' else t.transaction_type end as transactionTypeLabel, t.business_code as businessCode, t.material_code as materialCode, t.material_name as materialName, t.warehouse_code as warehouseCode, t.location_code as locationCode, t.lot_no as lotNo, t.unit as unit, t.quantity as quantity, t.create_time as occurredTime, r.receipt_code as sourceReceiptCode, po.order_code as sourceOrderCode from inventory_transaction t left join purchase_receipt_line rl on rl.id = t.source_receipt_line_id left join purchase_receipt r on r.id = rl.receipt_id left join purchase_order_line pol on pol.id = t.source_order_line_id left join purchase_order po on po.id = pol.order_id
order by t.create_time desc, t.id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
